editionTitle: IB ACIO Daily Current Affairs — 14 July 2026
editionTitle_hi: आईबी एसीआईओ दैनिक करेंट अफेयर्स — 14 जुलाई 2026

articles.title: National Education Policy (NEP) 2020 — Key Reforms
articles.summary: NEP 2020 replaces the 34-year-old policy with 5+3+3+4 structure, multidisciplinary education, and vocational training from Class 6.
articles.summary_hi: NEP 2020 34 वर्ष पुरानी नीति बदलती है — 5+3+3+4 संरचना, बहु-विषयक शिक्षा, Class 6 से व्यावसायिक प्रशिक्षण।
articles.content:
The National Education Policy 2020 was approved by the Union Cabinet in July 2020, replacing the NEP of 1986.

Key reforms: new curricular structure 5+3+3+4 (Foundational, Preparatory, Middle, Secondary), mother tongue/regional language as medium till Class 5, multidisciplinary education, and target of 50% GER in higher education by 2035.

NEP also proposes the National Research Foundation, Academic Bank of Credits, and multiple entry-exit in higher education.

For IB ACIO: year (2020), 5+3+3+4 structure, and GER 50% by 2035 are education policy essentials.
articles.content_hi:
NEP 2020 जुलाई 2020 में मंजूर, 1986 नीति बदली।

5+3+3+4 संरचना, Class 5 तक मातृभाषा, 2035 तक GER 50%।

National Research Foundation, Academic Bank of Credits। IB ACIO: 2020, 5+3+3+4 — याद रखें।
articles.question: NEP 2020 proposes which new school curricular structure?
articles.question_hi: NEP 2020 कौन सी नई स्कूली संरचना प्रस्तावित करती है?
articles.explanation: NEP 2020 replaces 10+2 with a 5+3+3+4 curricular and pedagogical structure.
articles.moreInfo: Foundational (3-8), Preparatory (8-11), Middle (11-14), Secondary (14-18) age groups approximately.
articles.moreInfo_hi: Foundational, Preparatory, Middle, Secondary — आयु समूह लगभग।

articles.title: World Trade Organization (WTO) — India’s Membership and Role
articles.title_hi: विश्व व्यापार संगठन (WTO) — भारत की सदस्यता और भूमिका
articles.summary: WTO regulates global trade since 1995. India has been a member since inception and advocates for developing country interests.
articles.summary_hi: WTO 1995 से वैश्विक व्यापार नियंत्रित करता है। भारत संस्थापक सदस्य, विकासशील देशों के हितों की वकालत।
articles.content:
The World Trade Organization replaced GATT in 1995 and has 164+ member nations. HQ is in Geneva, Switzerland.

WTO agreements cover goods (GATT), services (GATS), and intellectual property (TRIPS). India has been active in Doha Development Agenda and food security debates.

India's key WTO positions include protecting farmer subsidies (Minimum Support Price), special treatment for developing nations, and opposing unilateral trade barriers.

For IB ACIO: established (1995), HQ (Geneva), and TRIPS/GATS/GATT are trade GK basics.
articles.content_hi:
WTO 1995 में GATT की जगह। 164+ सदस्य। HQ Geneva।

GATT (वस्तुएं), GATS (सेवाएं), TRIPS (IP)। भारत किसान subsidy और developing nations की रक्षा।

IB ACIO: 1995, Geneva, TRIPS — याद रखें।
articles.question: Where is the headquarters of the World Trade Organization (WTO)?
articles.explanation: The WTO is headquartered in Geneva, Switzerland.
articles.explanation_hi: WTO का मुख्यालय Geneva, Switzerland में है।
articles.moreInfo: GATT founded 1947. WTO created 1995. Current DG: Ngozi Okonjo-Iweala (first woman, first African).

articles.title: Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code (IBC) 2016
articles.summary: IBC provides a time-bound framework for resolving insolvency of companies and individuals — landmark economic reform.
articles.summary_hi: IBC कंपनियों और व्यक्तियों के दिवालियापन के समयबद्ध समाधान का ढांचा देता है।
articles.content:
The Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code (IBC) was enacted in 2016 to consolidate insolvency laws and speed up resolution of stressed assets.

The Insolvency and Bankruptcy Board of India (IBBI) regulates the process. National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) adjudicates corporate insolvency. Resolution must be completed within 180 days (extendable by 90 days).

IBC has improved India's Ease of Doing Business ranking and recovery rates for creditors compared to earlier SARFAESI and DRT mechanisms.

For IB ACIO: year (2016), regulator (IBBI), adjudicator (NCLT), and 180-day timeline are key.
articles.content_hi:
IBC 2016 — दिवालियापन कानून एकीकृत, stressed assets तेज़ समाधान।

IBBI नियामक। NCLT न्यायिक। 180 दिन (+90 विस्तार)।

IB ACIO: 2016, IBBI, NCLT, 180 दिन — याद रखें।
articles.question: Which body adjudicates corporate insolvency cases under IBC?
articles.question_hi: IBC के तहत कॉर्पोरेट दिवालियापन मामले कौन सुनता है?
articles.explanation: The National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) adjudicates corporate insolvency under IBC.
articles.explanation_hi: NCLT IBC के तहत कॉर्पोरेट दिवालियापन सुनता है।
articles.moreInfo: NCLAT is the appellate authority. IBC amended multiple times since 2016.
articles.moreInfo_hi: NCLAT अपील प्राधिकरण। IBC 2016 से कई बार संशोधित।

articles.title: S-400 Triumf — India’s Air Defence System from Russia
articles.title_hi: S-400 Triumf — Russia से भारत की वायु रक्षा प्रणाली
articles.summary: India procured S-400 air defence missile systems from Russia — one of the world’s most advanced long-range SAM systems.
articles.summary_hi: India ने Russia से S-400 वायु रक्षा मिसाइल प्रणाली खरीदी — दुनिया की सबसे उन्नत SAM में से एक।
articles.content:
India signed a $5.43 billion deal with Russia in 2018 for five S-400 Triumf air defence squadrons.

S-400 can engage targets up to 400 km away including aircraft, drones, and ballistic missiles. Delivery began despite CAATSA (US sanctions) concerns.

India named its S-400 units as part of integrated air defence. First squadron is deployed covering the western border; others follow.

For IB ACIO: deal year (2018), range (400 km), supplier (Russia), and CAATSA context are defence procurement facts.
articles.content_hi:
India 2018 में Russia से $5.43B, 5 S-400 squadron।

400 km तक लक्ष्य — विमान, drone, ballistic missile। CAATSA चिंता के बावजूद delivery।

IB ACIO: 2018, 400 km, Russia — याद रखें।
articles.question: S-400 air defence system was procured by India from which country?
articles.question_hi: S-400 वायु रक्षा प्रणाली India ने किस देश से खरीदी?
articles.explanation: India procured the S-400 Triumf system from Russia under a 2018 agreement.
articles.explanation_hi: India ने 2018 समझौते के तहत Russia से S-400 खरीदी।
articles.moreInfo: Other imports: Rafale (France), Apache (USA), Heron drones (Israel). S-400 is Russian.
articles.moreInfo_hi: Rafale France, Apache USA, S-400 Russia।

articles.title: NavIC — India’s Regional Navigation Satellite System
articles.title_hi: NavIC — भारत की क्षेत्रीय नेविगेशन उपग्रह प्रणाली
articles.summary: NavIC (IRNSS) provides accurate positioning over India and 1500 km region — India’s alternative to GPS.
articles.summary_hi: NavIC (IRNSS) India और 1500 km क्षेत्र में सटीक positioning — GPS का भारतीय विकल्प।
articles.content:
Navigation with Indian Constellation (NavIC), formerly IRNSS, is India's independent regional navigation satellite system developed by ISRO.

It consists of 7 satellites (3 geostationary + 4 geosynchronous) providing positioning accuracy of better than 20 metres over India and region extending 1500 km.

NavIC is being mandated in smartphones sold in India from 2025. It supports disaster management, fleet tracking, and military navigation.

For IB ACIO: full form, developer (ISRO), 7 satellites, and coverage (India + 1500 km) are space tech facts.
articles.content_hi:
NavIC (IRNSS) ISRO द्वारा स्वतंत्र regional navigation system।

7 satellites, 20m सटीकता, India + 1500 km। 2025 से smartphones में mandatory।

IB ACIO: ISRO, 7 satellites — याद रखें।
articles.question: NavIC navigation system was developed by which organisation?
articles.question_hi: NavIC नेविगेशन प्रणाली किस संगठन द्वारा विकसित की गई?
articles.explanation: NavIC (IRNSS) was developed and is operated by ISRO.
articles.explanation_hi: NavIC ISRO द्वारा विकसित और संचालित है।
articles.moreInfo: GPS (USA), GLONASS (Russia), Galileo (EU), BeiDou (China). NavIC is regional, not global.
articles.moreInfo_hi: GPS USA, GLONASS Russia, Galileo EU, BeiDou China। NavIC regional है।

articles.title: PM Mudra Yojana — Collateral-Free Loans for Micro Enterprises
articles.title_hi: पीएम मुद्रा योजना — सूक्ष्म उद्यमों के लिए बिना जमानत ऋण
articles.summary: MUDRA provides loans up to ₹10 lakh under Shishu, Kishore, and Tarun categories to non-corporate small businesses.
articles.summary_hi: MUDRA Shishu, Kishore, Tarun श्रेणियों में ₹10 लाख तक बिना जमानत ऋण देता है।
articles.content:
Pradhan Mantri MUDRA Yojana (PMMY) was launched on 8 April 2015 to provide collateral-free loans up to ₹10 lakh to non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises.

Three categories: Shishu (up to ₹50,000), Kishore (₹50,001 to ₹5 lakh), Tarun (₹5,00,001 to ₹10 lakh). Loans are given by banks, NBFCs, and MFIs.

MUDRA Ltd (Micro Units Development & Refinance Agency) refinances lending institutions. Over 40 crore loans have been sanctioned under the scheme.

For IB ACIO: launch (2015), max (₹10 lakh), and three categories (Shishu/Kishore/Tarun) are scheme essentials.
articles.content_hi:
PMMY 8 अप्रैल 2015। ₹10 लाख तक collateral-free।

Shishu (₹50K), Kishore (₹5L), Tarun (₹10L)। MUDRA Ltd refinance।

IB ACIO: 2015, 3 categories — याद रखें।
articles.question: What is the maximum loan amount under PM Mudra Yojana?
articles.question_hi: PM Mudra Yojana में अधिकतम ऋण राशि क्या है?
articles.explanation: PM Mudra Yojana provides loans up to ₹10 lakh under the Tarun category.
articles.explanation_hi: PM Mudra Tarun श्रेणी में ₹10 लाख तक ऋण देता है।
articles.moreInfo: Related: Stand-Up India (₹10L-₹1Cr), Startup India. MUDRA targets micro level.
articles.moreInfo_hi: संबंधित: Stand-Up India, Startup India। MUDRA micro स्तर।

articles.title: Project Tiger — India’s Flagship Wildlife Conservation Programme
articles.title_hi: प्रोजेक्ट टाइगर — भारत का प्रमुख वन्यजीव संरक्षण कार्यक्रम
articles.summary: Launched in 1973, Project Tiger has helped India’s tiger population reach 3,167 (2022 census) — 75% of world’s wild tigers.
articles.summary_hi: 1973 में शुरू, Project Tiger ने बाघ संख्या 3,167 (2022) तक पहुंचाई — दुनिया के 75% जंगली बाघ India में।
articles.content:
Project Tiger was launched on 1 April 1973 from Jim Corbett National Park (then Hailey National Park) in Uttarakhand.

It established a network of Tiger Reserves across India. The National Tiger Conservation Authority (NTCA) oversees the project under the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change.

The 2022 All India Tiger Estimation recorded 3,167 tigers — India hosts about 75% of the world's wild tiger population. Madhya Pradesh has the highest number of tigers.

For IB ACIO: launch (1973), NTCA, 2022 count (3,167), and MP as top state are environment GK facts.
articles.content_hi:
Project Tiger 1 अप्रैल 1973, Jim Corbett से शुरू।

NTCA देखरेख। 2022: 3,167 बाघ, India ~75% world। MP सर्वाधिक।

IB ACIO: 1973, 3167, NTCA — याद रखें।
articles.question: Project Tiger was launched in which year?
articles.question_hi: Project Tiger किस वर्ष शुरू किया गया?
articles.explanation: Project Tiger was launched on 1 April 1973 to protect the Bengal tiger and its habitat.
articles.explanation_hi: Project Tiger 1 अप्रैल 1973 को Bengal tiger संरक्षण के लिए शुरू हुआ।
articles.moreInfo: Project Elephant (1992). International Tiger Day: 29 July. Global Tiger Forum HQ: New Delhi.
articles.moreInfo_hi: Project Elephant 1992। International Tiger Day: 29 July।

articles.title: Attorney General of India — Role and Appointment
articles.title_hi: भारत के महान्यायवादी — भूमिका और नियुक्ति
articles.summary: The Attorney General is the chief legal adviser to the Government of India, appointed under Article 76.
articles.summary_hi: महान्यायवादी भारत सरकार का प्रमुख कानूनी सलाहकार है, धारा 76 के तहत नियुक्त।
articles.content:
The Attorney General of India is the highest law officer of the country, appointed by the President under Article 76 of the Constitution.

Must be qualified to be appointed a Supreme Court judge. Holds office during the pleasure of the President. The AG advises the government on legal matters and represents the Union in SC/HC.

The Solicitor General and Additional Solicitors General assist the AG. Unlike the AG, they are not constitutional posts.

For IB ACIO: Article 76, appointment by President, and distinction from Solicitor General are polity facts.
articles.content_hi:
महान्यायवादी धारा 76 के तहत राष्ट्रपति द्वारा नियुक्त, SC judge योग्यता।

सरकार को कानूनी सलाह, SC/HC में प्रतिनिधित्व। SG/ASG सहायता — संवैधानिक पद नहीं।

IB ACIO: धारा 76, राष्ट्रपति — याद रखें।
articles.question: The Attorney General of India is appointed under which Article of the Constitution?
articles.question_hi: महान्यायवादी संविधान की किस धारा के तहत नियुक्त होते हैं?
articles.explanation: Article 76 provides for the appointment of the Attorney General of India.
articles.explanation_hi: धारा 76 भारत के महान्यायवादी की नियुक्ति का प्रावधान करती है।
articles.moreInfo: Article 148: CAG. Article 124: SC. Article 74: Council of Ministers to aid President.
articles.moreInfo_hi: धारा 148: CAG। धारा 124: SC। धारा 74: मंत्रिपरिषद।

articles.title: Emergency Provisions — Articles 352, 356, 360
articles.summary: The Constitution provides three types of emergencies: National (352), State/President’s Rule (356), and Financial (360).
articles.summary_hi: संविधान में तीन आपातकाल: राष्ट्रीय (352), राज्य/President's Rule (356), वित्तीय (360)।
articles.content:
Article 352: National Emergency (war, external aggression, armed rebellion). Proclaimed by President on Cabinet advice. Lok Sabha approval within 1 month.

Article 356: President's Rule in a state when state government cannot function per Constitution. Used when state fails constitutional machinery.

Article 360: Financial Emergency — President can direct states on financial matters. Never been proclaimed in India.

National Emergency declared 3 times: 1962 (China war), 1971 (Bangladesh war), 1975-77 (internal).

For IB ACIO: three articles, three types, and 1975 emergency under Indira Gandhi are critical polity topics.
articles.content_hi:
धारा 352: राष्ट्रीय आपातकाल। 356: President's Rule। 360: वित्तीय (कभी नहीं)।

राष्ट्रीय 3 बार: 1962, 1971, 1975-77।

IB ACIO: 352/356/360 — अत्यंत महत्वपूर्ण।
articles.question: Which Article deals with President's Rule in states?
articles.question_hi: राज्यों में President's Rule किस धारा से संबंधित है?
articles.explanation: Article 356 allows the President to impose President's Rule when state constitutional machinery fails.
articles.explanation_hi: धारा 356 राज्य की संवैधानिक मशीनरी विफल होने पर President's Rule लगाने की अनुमति देती है।
articles.moreInfo: Related: 10 July Article 370 article. 44th Amendment (1978) restricted misuse of Article 352.
articles.moreInfo_hi: संबंधित: 10 जुलाई Article 370। 44वां संशोधन 352 दurupयोग सीमित।

articles.title: Nobel Prize — Categories and Recent Indian-Origin Laureates
articles.title_hi: नोबेल पुरस्कार — श्रेणियां और हाल के भारतीय-मूल laureates
articles.summary: Nobel Prizes are awarded in Physics, Chemistry, Medicine, Literature, Peace, and Economics — instituted 1901.
articles.summary_hi: नोबेल Physics, Chemistry, Medicine, Literature, Peace, Economics में — 1901 से।
articles.content:
The Nobel Prizes were established per Alfred Nobel's 1895 will, first awarded in 1901. They are presented in Stockholm (except Peace Prize in Oslo).

Indian Nobel laureates include Rabindranath Tagore (Literature 1913), CV Raman (Physics 1930), Mother Teresa (Peace 1979), Amartya Sen (Economics 1998), and Kailash Satyarthi (Peace 2014, shared with Malala).

Abhijit Banerjee won Economics Nobel in 2019. Har Gobind Khorana (Medicine 1968) and Subrahmanyan Chandrasekhar (Physics 1983) were Indian-origin laureates.

For IB ACIO: six categories, Tagore as first Indian, and recent laureates are awards GK staples.
articles.content_hi:
Nobel 1901 से, Alfred Nobel की इच्छा। Stockholm (Peace Oslo)।

भारतीय: Tagore 1913, CV Raman 1930, Mother Teresa 1979, Amartya Sen 1998, Kailash Satyarthi 2014, Abhijit Banerjee 2019।

IB ACIO: 6 categories, Tagore first — याद रखें।
articles.question: Who was the first Indian citizen to win a Nobel Prize?
articles.question_hi: नोबेल जीतने वाले पहले भारतीय नागरिक कौन थे?
articles.explanation: Rabindranath Tagore won the Nobel Prize in Literature in 1913 for Gitanjali.
articles.explanation_hi: Rabindranath Tagore ने 1913 में Gitanjali के लिए साहित्य Nobel जीता।
articles.moreInfo: Mother Teresa was born in Albania (Macedonia). Tagore and Raman were Indian citizens.
articles.moreInfo_hi: Mother Teresa Albania में जन्मीं। Tagore और Raman भारतीय नागरिक।
